## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmt` run locally — no formatting changes outstanding
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make validate` passes
- [ ] Module `README.md` updated if modules changed (run `make docs`)
- [ ] `accounts.yml` updated if a new account was added
- [ ] No hardcoded account IDs or ARNs
- [ ] Permissions boundary attached to any new IAM roles created under a partner path
- [ ] GitHub secrets documented if new secrets were added
